name: dit-shop-root
description: Dit Shop Gift Card Store - Root Configuration

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix "Dit shop (1)/Dit shop/backend" install && npm --prefix functions install
scripts.stop: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conns) { $conns | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; Write-Host 'Killed process' $_ } } else { Write-Host 'No server running on port 3000' }"
